name: Smoked Turkey Jerky
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Cooked turkey, sliced paper thin (thighs are best)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all marinade ingredients in a bowl.
2. Dip each meat slice into the marinade.
3. Arrange dipped slices in layers in a bowl or dish.
4. Pour remaining marinade over the meat.
5. Cover tightly and refrigerate for 6 to 12 hours, rotating layers occasionally.
6. Dehydrate until fully dry.
7. While drying, blot excess oil with paper towels.
